raw_title: From Industry Hype to Emerging Criticism: Analysing Chilean News Media Coverage of Artificial Intelligence
title_en: From Industry Hype to Emerging Criticism: Analysing Chilean News Media Coverage of Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 从行业炒作到新兴批评：分析智利新闻媒体对人工智能的报道
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了智利新闻媒体如何报道人工智能。它探讨了报道从最初对AI的积极宣传逐渐转向更多批评性讨论的过程。研究关注媒体如何塑造公众对AI技术的理解，以及这种报道变化背后的社会和政治因素。
plain_summary_en: This study analyzes how Chilean news media cover artificial intelligence. It examines the shift from initial positive hype about AI to more critical discussions. The research focuses on how media shape public understanding of AI technology and the social and political factors behind this change in coverage.
research_direction_zh: 媒体与技术报道研究，关注新闻媒体如何构建和传播新兴技术的社会叙事，以及这种报道如何影响公众认知和政策讨论。
research_direction_en: Media and technology reporting research, focusing on how news media construct and disseminate social narratives about emerging technologies, and how this coverage influences public perception and policy discussions.
